title: This Cant Be It
description: COME AND SEE THE SHOW OF YOUR LIFETIME. It’s my (LOZ DODD) show - a special show like NO other. DIFFERENT EVERY TIME. Powerful. Urgent. What even is this? Where are we going? How do we know what’s real? COME. You’ll leave changed - GUARANTEED. In his quest to make sense of everything, Loz discovers he knows nothing. In his unraveling, he searches for meaning with what’s left: himself, a room, and the people in it. This Can’t Be It is a semi-improvised, feverish and open-hearted exploration of how we stay open to mystery (and to each other) in the midst of uncertainty and collapse. Directed by Lara Ricote Rachael Dobbie on tech
